title: Corellian Sector Fleet
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Corellian Sector Fleet''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Sector fleet/Legends|Sector Fleet]], assigned to the defense of [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]].<ref name="AaC">''[[Ambush at Corellia]]''</ref> As a young Imperial officer, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] was promised a good career in the Corellian Sector Fleet before he was ousted of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] for helping [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]].<ref name="TNEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Naomi Dargon]] of the Corellian sector controlled a fleet of [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]]. She used it at some point to [[Base Delta Zero/Legends|bombard]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Froz]] from orbit, because of its disloyalty to the Empire, [[Devastation of Froz|decimating]] all life on the surface.<ref name="SoF">''[[Suns of Fortune]]''</ref>

Anti-[[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and [[Gunship/Legends|gunships]] were supplied to the force by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]].<ref name="TEGtW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' {{1stm}}
